infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MJ Maps uses your location continuously during active delivery shifts to track route progress, calculate turn-by-turn navigation, and send real-time ETA updates to customers. Location is collected in the background while a delivery shift is active.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MJ Maps uses your location to show your position on the delivery route map and calculate navigation to each stop.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MJ Maps needs camera access to capture proof of delivery photos and scan parcel barcodes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MJ Maps needs photo library access to attach delivery photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: MJ Maps uses your location continuously during active delivery shifts to track route progress, calculate navigation, and send real-time ETA updates to customers. Location is collected in the background while a shift is active.

plugins.cameraPermission: MJ Maps needs camera access to scan parcel barcodes.

plugins.photosPermission: MJ Maps needs camera access to capture proof of delivery photos.
